title: Falcon - Custom button - Teams Not Detected
scenario: Custom Button configuration in Device Settings shows Microsoft Teams as default option with correct modal behavior when Teams is not detected by Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the device name to open Device Settings
Scroll to Custom Button configuration section
Observe the Custom Button UI when Microsoft Teams is not detected by the app
Note the two options displayed: Microsoft Teams (selected by default) and Other Providers
Read the message indicating Teams is not connected
Observe the additional options revealed: Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing
expected: When Microsoft Teams is not detected, the Custom Button UI shows two options (Microsoft Teams selected by default, and Other Providers) with a message indicating Teams is not connected. Selecting 'Other Providers' reveals additional options (Play/Pause, Voice Assistant, Hold/Resume Call, ANC/Transparency Mode, Do Nothing). Switching back to Microsoft Teams shows a modal stating Teams is not connected and prompting to select Other Providers.
